title: Server bootstrap — Express app init, static file serving, port binding
acceptance_criteria: server/index.js exists and exports a configured Express app
Static files served from dist/ directory
PORT configurable via process.env.PORT, defaults to 3000
npm start runs the server without errors
completion_summary: Scaffolded server/index.js with Express ESM app, static file serving from dist/, 0.0.0.0 binding, PORT env var, graceful shutdown
